Package index

Systems and solvers

Define an ODE system and advance it through time.

LorenzSystem
Lorenz System R6 Class
Lorenz_Solver
Lorenz Solver R6 Class

Solver control

Tolerances and step-size settings for the adaptive stepper.

OdeControl
OdeControl R6 Class

Drivers

External, time-varying forcing variables.

Drivers
Drivers R6 Class

Package and utilities

odelia-package odelia
ODE Solver with Automatic Differentiation, in C++ Header Files
odelia_load_dll()
Load odelia shared library with configurable symbol visibility

Low-level wrappers

Thin wrappers over the underlying C++ functions. Most users should prefer the R6 classes above.

low_level_wrappers Drivers_new Drivers_set_constant Drivers_set_variable Drivers_set_extrapolate Drivers_evaluate Drivers_evaluate_range Drivers_get_names Drivers_clear OdeControl_new OdeControl_get_controls OdeControl_set_controls OdeControl_set_tol_abs OdeControl_set_tol_rel OdeControl_set_a_y OdeControl_set_a_dydt OdeControl_set_step_size_min OdeControl_set_step_size_max OdeControl_set_step_size_initial
Low-level Drivers and OdeControl wrappers
